  "findings": [
    "Non-rated lighting fixture staged for installation in a Class I, Division 2 hazardous location."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged non-rated fixture.",
    "Procure and verify a fixture explicitly listed and marked for Class I, Division 2 applications.",
    "Verify the temperature rating (T-code) of the replacement fixture matches the ignition temperature of the specific gas or vapor present."
  ],
  "rationale": "Staging a non-rated fixture for installation in a Class I, Division 2 area violates NEC requirements. Fixtures in these locations must be identified for Class I, Division 2 use, or be of a type permitted by NEC 501.130(B) to prevent ignition of flammable gases or vapors.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 501.130(B)",
    "NEC 500.8"
  ]
}
